steps.t: Heart-rot is at the Twisted Grove, which lies south-west of the Eavespires. As well as driving the wood-trolls from his grove, Erchiel also asked you …
Erchiel is at the Eavespires, on the north-west shore of Lake Evendim. You should return to the Eavespires and tell Erchiel of your battle with Heart-…
